rows.answer: Against the **Bangladesh Labour Act 2006** as published in the provided 2009 BEF handbook — amendments after 2006 are not in this corpus — the Act requires employers to grant **11 days of paid festival holidays** in a calendar year.

rows.q: What is the maximum number of hours an adult worker can work in a day?
rows.answer:
Against the **Bangladesh Labour Act 2006** as published in the provided 2009 BEF handbook — amendments after 2006 are not in this corpus — the statutory maximum for an adult worker in a day is **10 hours**, including overtime.

rows.q: What is the maximum weekly working time?
rows.answer:
Against the **Bangladesh Labour Act 2006** as published in the provided 2009 BEF handbook — amendments after 2006 are not in this corpus — the statutory maximum weekly working time for an **adult worker** is **60 hours** in any single week, with an annual average of **56 hours per week**.
